---
title: "Module Schedule"
page-layout: full
---

## Course Modules (7.5 Weeks)

The schedule below maps each module to its slides, activity loop, and assessment. Slides marked "In progress" are not yet published; checkpoint dates and project deadlines are marked TODO pending final calendar confirmation.

| Week | Topic | Slides | Activity Loop | Readings | Assessment |
|------|-------|--------|--------------|----------|------------|
| 1 | **Linear Models & Least Squares** | [Module 1]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m1-linear-least-squares/) | [week01-least-squares]({{< var activities_url >}}/week01-least-squares/) | Murphy: Ch. 1–2; Prince: §2.1 | — |
| 2 | **Generalization** | [Module 2]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m2-generalization/) | [week02-bias-variance]({{< var activities_url >}}/week02-bias-variance/) | Murphy: Ch. 5; James et al. § 6.1 | Checkpoint 1 (TODO) |
| 3 | **MLE & Parameter Uncertainty** | [Module 3]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/) | — | Murphy: Ch. 3–4 | — |
| 4 | **Bayesian Inference** | [Module 4 (In progress)]({{< var slides_url >}}) | [week03-bayesian-updating]({{< var activities_url >}}/week03-bayesian-updating/) | Think Bayes: Ch. 2–3 | Checkpoint 2 (TODO) |
| 5 | **Approximate Inference & Bayesian Classification** | [Module 5 (In progress)]({{< var slides_url >}}) | [week04-logistic-regression]({{< var activities_url >}}/week04-logistic-regression/) | TBD | **Project 1 Due (TODO)** |
| 6 | **SVM & Clustering** | [Module 6 (In progress)]({{< var slides_url >}}) | [week05-kmeans]({{< var activities_url >}}/week05-kmeans/) | Murphy: Ch. 8; Prince: Ch. 12 | Checkpoint 3 (TODO) |
| 7 | **PCA** | [Module 7 (In progress)]({{< var slides_url >}}) | [week06-pca]({{< var activities_url >}}/week06-pca/) | Murphy: Ch. 20; Prince: Ch. 11 | **Project 2 Due (TODO)** |

*(Activity slugs are week-named and land one week after their module opens from Module 4 on — modules ≠ weeks. Module 3 has no activity; a parameter-uncertainty tool is a future build.)*

---

## Legend

- **Slides**: Links to module landing pages listing the live reveal.js decks (dark/light toggle, top-right; a rendered `.pdf` ships alongside each deck).
- **Activity Loop**: Interactive tool + retakeable mastery quiz → reflection → peer review → revise (completion tokens honor-verified).
- **Readings**: Primary texts; specific chapters/sections to be refined.
- **Assessment**: Checkpoint sittings and project deadlines (calendar TBD).

All external links open in a new tab.
